李玄穿越纣王，开局九尾索命，封神将至。
觉醒【多子多福系统】，开枝散叶即可掠夺血脉、暴击返还修为！
苏妲己想吸龙气？反手镇压，孕育【混沌天妖体】，奖励：天仙修为、人皇圣体！
闻太师闯宫诛妖妃，天眼一开，惊见腹中“大道漩涡”，当场滑跪：
“此乃截教圣婴！谁敢动娘娘，老夫灭他满门！”
此后，闻太师化身“催生办主任”，满洪荒摇人：“云霄师姐，为截教未来，请进宫……”
西岐兵临城下，面对的竟是全员先天灵宝的“圣人子嗣军团”！
女娲质问：“妖族卧底何在？”
帝辛指着苏妲己：“在放产假。娘娘，为兴人族，要不你也来……延续香火？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9dfef6ee39c5ebfd57e4d81c2443cc12~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不言的风","author_id":"","book_id":"7584485793138232344","book_name":"封神：只要胆子大，我让九尾放产","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b0a090","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8470人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7584485867180278296","read_count":"8470","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"489627"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"187","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,东方玄幻,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9dfef6ee39c5ebfd57e4d81c2443cc12~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469951&x-signature=oOxTZ0rykS2SDIsrGUbkiZymSBk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1860025201735843","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"66"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text"
